name: mypgs
description: MyPGS frontend theme and UI behaviors, with bundled JavaScript and CSS assets.

scripts.syncmaster-forzato: git fetch origin && git checkout dev && git pull --rebase origin dev && git rebase origin/master && git push --force-with-lease origin dev && git checkout master && git pull --ff-only origin master && git merge --ff-only dev && git push origin master && git checkout dev
scripts.syncmaster: git fetch origin && git checkout master && git pull --ff-only origin master && git merge --ff-only origin/dev && git push origin master && git checkout dev
